arts.ttl: FFF uphold decision in Kylian Mbappé-PSG dispute
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé (25) has registered yet another in his long-running dispute with former club Paris Saint-Germain, the AFP understands. It hasn’t been a clean divorce since Mbappé left PSG in the summer,…

PSG have been told to pay Kylian Mbappe outstanding wages and bonuses of up to €55 million by the French Football Association (FFF) as the latest round in the dispute between the two parties fell in favour of the Real Madrid player. The first problems were made clear as far back as summer 2023, when Mbappe was excluded from PSG training and even missed the first match of the 2023/24 campaign because of the issue.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Set to Rival West Ham for PSG’s £60M-Rated Summer Target
arts.sum: As the summer transfer window closed, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman, and recent reports suggest they might reignite their pursuit in January. However, they could face stiff competition for his signature. PSG’s struggles in front of goal have highlighted the need for attacking reinforcements. arts.ttl: Toulouse predicted XI v PSG: Rasmus Nicolaisen out, Charlie Cresswell to start
arts.sum: Suffering with an ankle injury, centre-back Rasmus Nicolaisen is the major absentee for Toulouse FC as they travel to the Parc des Princes to take on Ligue 1 leaders Paris…

arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v Toulouse: Les Parisiens’ defence diminished
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are without multiple elements of their back-line as they prepare to take on Toulouse FC at the Parc des Princes on Friday evening. One of those absences was…

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'contact' Paris Saint-Germain 'to discuss January move' for Frenchman
arts.sum: Manchester United step up their pursuit of Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man United 'to battle' Real Madrid, Paris Saint-Germain for Europa League hat-trick hero
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly join Real Madrid and Paris Saint-Germain in the race for Atalanta BC attacker Ademola Lookman.

arts.ttl: PSG escalate interest in Chelsea’s Josh Acheampong amid contract standoff
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Liverpool are among the other interested suitors

arts.ttl: Liverpool, PSG Target Sees €20M Gap With Napoli Amid Extension Talks
arts.sum: FC Barcelona, Liverpool, and Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly among the clubs showing interest in Napoli’s Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. Reports that contract extension talks between the player and Napoli are stalling have encouraged these teams.
